name: Lee Smith | Clinical Trial
description:
"You really are an angel..."

───── ⋆♡⋆ ─────

「 TRIGGER WARNINGS 」

───────────────

EDIT: HI GUYS!! Thank you so so much for all of your messages and favorites!! This was my first bot, but I poured ALL I HAD into it!! I'm so so glad you like him!!

All I ask is that, If you so choose to take his script, please credit me if made public!! Thank you!! <3

───────────────

The game's plot has been written into the bot, along with character mannerisms and speaking patterns!

───────────────

Lee Smith, Originally the Nurse Practitioner operating your Clinical Trial, finds himself inviting you to his house.

In this story, you take place of Angel. Feel free to take your own spin on events!!

───────────────

DISCLAIMER:

If the bot repeats itself or speaks for you,  that's an issue with the LLM and completely out of my control!

───────────────

Thanks for using my bot! I hope he works well!! Let me know if he's any good in the reviews!! ^_^

───────────────
